name: Grade 4 Mathematics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 4 pathway for multi-digit operations, fraction equivalence, angles, and measurement. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 4 knowledge and transferable skills in multi-digit operations, fraction equivalence, angles, and measurement.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
